title: Mileage Tracking - Track Travel for Tax Deductions
description: Add mileage tracking capability to allow subcontractors to record and track miles driven for each project. Enables tax deduction tracking and travel expense management with GPS-based location capture.
acceptance_criteria: Users can create mileage entries with start/end locations, date, project association, and purpose
Mileage entries can be manually entered or calculated from GPS coordinates
Mileage list view shows all entries with filtering by project and date range
Mileage summary view shows totals by project, month, and year
Mileage report can be exported as PDF for tax purposes
All data persists in IndexedDB for offline functionality
Mileage entries are editable and deletable
Dashboard includes quick link to recent mileage entries
